title: Gentle Glutinous Stroop
description: A creamy and festive vegan dish inspired by the traditional Dutch version, featuring garlic for a unique twist.

ingredients.name: Almond milk or any plant-based milk
Baking soda (or cream of tartar for vegan-friendly)
Coconut oil or vegan margarine (optional for added richness)

instructions: Blend soaked cashews until smooth. Add almond milk, water, baking soda (or cream of tartar), and salt to the blender with the cashew mixture.
Mix in brown sugar or maple syrup slowly until well combined. Taste for seasoning and adjust if needed.
Heat oil or margarine in a pan over medium heat. Once hot, pour in the blended mixture and cook on low-medium heat, stirring frequently to prevent sticking.
Cook the mixture for about 20-30 minutes or until it has thickened enough to coat the back of a spoon. Stir occasionally during this process.

If desired, add additional water gradually (starting with 1/4 cup) to thin out the mixture as needed without losing its thickness. Continue cooking and stirring until it reaches your desired consistency.
Once satisfied with the texture, remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
